title: Engines Still Sleeping
storyPurpose: Central archive opens; world map of dormant engines; storm mountain signal; Seris escapes with partial records.

panels.description: Guardian opens central archive chamber — floating cartographic crystal with several dormant Rift engine markers.
One marker flares violently — storm-covered mountain kingdom far northeast.
Seris Vale escapes through collapsing service gate with partial crystal records under arm; Nira does not chase.

bubbles.text: Control can wait. Data does not.
bubbles.speaker: Seris Vale

bubbles.text: Run. I'll still hate the cage.
bubbles.speaker: Nira Quill

panels.description: Echoquill Living Archive shimmer stores a fragment of the map for the team; Mira studies storm node.

dialogue.text: Control can wait. Data does not.
dialogue.speaker: Seris Vale

dialogue.text: Run. I'll still hate the cage.
dialogue.speaker: Nira Quill

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; pale stone, teal crystal, gold inlay, cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Lost City" Issue #4, STORY PAGE 24/25 — Engines Still Sleeping. Story purpose: Central archive opens; world map of dormant engines; storm mountain signal; Seris escapes with partial records. Layout: grid-2x2. 4 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p24a): Guardian opens central archive chamber — floating cartographic crystal with several dormant Rift engine markers. Panel 2 (p24b): One marker flares violently — storm-covered mountain kingdom far northeast. Panel 3 (p24c): Seris Vale escapes through collapsing service gate with partial crystal records under arm; Nira does not chase. Panel 4 (p24d): Echoquill Living Archive shimmer stores a fragment of the map for the team; Mira studies storm node. Characters: mira-eggwarden, seris-vale, nira-quill, cael-vesper. Creatures: spark, echoquill. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Environment: Aureth Vale Lost City. Time: day. Weather: clear over ruins. Lighting: pale stone with teal crystal glow. Continuity: {"stormSignal": true, "seris": "escaped with partial records", "guardian": "uneasy ally"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; Guardian speech may be formal/fragmented.
artAlt: Engines Still Sleeping — The Lost City page 24
transcript: SPEECH (Last Guardian): Network incomplete. Nodes dormant.
SPEECH (Seris Vale): Control can wait. Data does not.
WHISPER (Nira Quill): Run. I'll still hate the cage.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Another light. Another choice waiting.
